# clo_dbaas_clusters (Data Source)

Fetches the list of dbaas clusters in the project

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "clo_dbaas_clusters" "all" {
  project_id = "1e8ff0f7-0b8c-4ec5-a0a4-e30cea0db287"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_id` (String) ID of the project that owns dbaas clusters

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `result` (List of Object) The object that holds the results (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--result))

<a id="nestedatt--result"></a>
### Nested Schema for `result`

Read-Only:

- `backup_hour` (Number)
- `created_in` (String)
- `databases_count` (Number)
- `datastore_id` (String)
- `datastore_name` (String)
- `datastore_version` (String)
- `external_address` (String)
- `flavor` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--result--flavor))
- `id` (String)
- `internal_address` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `nodes_count` (Number)
- `status` (String)
- `storage_size` (Number)
- `storage_used_kb` (Number)
- `switch_status` (String)
- `system_disk_size` (Number)

<a id="nestedobjatt--result--flavor"></a>
### Nested Schema for `result.flavor`

Read-Only:

- `disk` (Number)
- `ram` (Number)
- `vcpus` (Number)
